grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: No specific section numbers cited - mentions 'Lenders' Handbook' generically but lacks precise references

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Discusses varying lender requirements but doesn't reference Part 2 or handbook structure

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: No mention of statutory enforcement periods or time thresholds for building regulations breaches

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions indemnity insurance as option some lenders may accept for building regulations issues

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: While mentioning the handbook, most advice is generic property law rather than handbook-specific requirements
